editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Evidence base is complete but small (k=4 exhausts the full trial universe); heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are structurally underpowered. Treat as a boundary condition; flag for living-review update when new trials accrue.
Pooled 7.13 sits outside published benchmark range (corridor 2.50-6.20); closest Guttman-Yassky 2021 RR 4.50 [3.30, 6.20]. Discussion should reconcile.
QoL / PROs reported in 2 trial(s) (QoL (generic), PP-NRS) but not in headline pool; consider adding as a secondary analysis rather than omitting.
